name: Breast of Chicken on Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 can (10 1/2 oz) cream of mushroom soup
1 can (4 oz) mushroom stems and pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Mix together one can of cream of mushroom soup and a Soup can of milk, reserving half of the soup mixture.
3. Combine the remaining soup mixture with rice, mushrooms (including liquid), and half of the onion soup mix in an oblong baking dish.
4. Place the chicken breasts on top of the mixture.
5. Pour the reserved soup mixture over the chicken.
6. Sprinkle the remaining onion soup mix evenly over the top.
7. Cover and bake for 1 hour.
8. Remove the cover and continue baking for an additional 15 minutes.
